summary: Backend Refactoring Regression Tests Complete. All 22 tests passed (100%). The refactoring successfully extracted shared code from the 8141-line server.py into proper modules (config/, models/, auth/) and all existing functionality continues to work.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring correctly extracted database connection to config/database.py
Environment settings properly centralized in config/settings.py
119 distribution platforms config moved to config/platforms.py
Core Pydantic models (User, Token, etc.) extracted to models/core.py
Auth functions (verify_password, create_access_token, get_current_user) in auth/service.py
All imports updated in 17 dependent files
Backward-compatible aliases preserved in server.py for smooth migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified. The extracted modules are: config/database.py (MongoDB), config/settings.py (env vars), config/platforms.py (119 platforms), models/core.py (User, Token, etc.), models/agency.py (Agency models), auth/service.py (auth functions). All APIs continue to work correctly.
